prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have real-time market data access or advanced financial modeling capabilities to provide accurate stock price predictions. This prediction is generated using a simplified statistical approach. The point estimate assumes the price will remain at the current level in the very short term. The confidence intervals are constructed using an assumed daily volatility of 0.7% (calculated as 0.7% of the current price, which is $7.60) based on typical daily movements of large-cap stocks and a normal distribution model. Actual future prices may vary significantly.
